title: brickellia nevinii
intro: Brickellia nevinii, also known as Nevin's brickellia, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Brickellia nevinii include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and aiding in the relief of congestion. Herbal preparations of Brickellia nevinii can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
